url_length: Total number of characters in the URL string.
num_digits: Number of numeric characters in the URL.
num_special: Number of non-alphanumeric characters in the URL.
num_dots: Number of dot characters in the URL.
has_ip: Binary flag indicating whether the URL contains an IPv4-style raw IP address.
has_https: Binary flag indicating whether the URL starts with HTTPS.
has_login: Binary flag for the keyword login.
has_verify: Binary flag for the keyword verify.
has_secure: Binary flag for the keyword secure.
